doctor_name: Dr. Blake Weber & Dr. Hunter Weber
doctor_credentials: Both DDS (Doctor of Dental Surgery). Dr. Blake Weber: DDS from University of Tennessee, BS Zoology from University of Arkansas — 30+ years in practice. Dr. Hunter Weber: DDS from University of Tennessee in Memphis, BS Biology from University of Alabama at Birmingham — specializes in restorative dentistry, Invisalign, and full mouth reconstruction.

reviews.text: This dental group is very warm and caring for their clients. I took my 91-year-old mom here — they decorated for her birthday!
Abby is an amazing hygienist. She took her time to explain everything to me and my appointment did not feel rushed at all!
Our family has been coming here for several years, and we consistently have an excellent experience. The staff is warm, welcoming, and genuinely attentive.
The team used an oral scanner instead of the traditional molding process and created a replacement plan for my implant cap. Very impressed with the technology and the care.
As a dental student myself, the way both of these dentists and their staff treat patients is truly top notch. Thorough, skilled, and the bedside manner is exceptional.
Simply put — they do everything right. Customer service, quality of care, scheduling, location, atmosphere. 10 out of 10 on every front.
Wonderful dental practice, very friendly, highly recommend.

I can't say enough good things about Dental Solutions of Central Park! Dr. Blake and Dr. Hunter are seriously the nicest father/son duo — professional, kind, and always take the time to offer sound, straightforward advice. The entire team here is friendly, reliable, and quick.
I have used Dr. Weber as my dentist for years. He and his staff have always been friendly and thorough. He has taken very good care of our family. I recommend him very highly.
Dr. Blake Weber is the best dentist I have ever met. He is a pleasure to work with, communicative, and very gentle with my anxiety, and my mouth.
Dr. Blake Weber and his son Dr. Hunter Weber are very friendly and capable dentists. Dr. Blake Weber was very informative and helpful with my questions about cavity prevention.
Dr. Hunter and Blake Weber are wonderful dentists and exceptionally knowledgeable about the work they do. They make you feel like family and walk you step by step through the procedure.
I'm really happy I made the switch! I've really enjoyed coming to Dental Solutions for several reasons: super friendly staff, clean and modern facility, open availability, and amazing care.
Always a great experience at Dental Solutions of Central Park. Lots of safety measures in place, including air filtration units in each room. I feel very comfortable and safe here.
The team has really made an effort to get to know me and my family, and they are great with small children.
Dental Solutions overall communicates well, is helpful, they know my name when I walk into reception, and my visits are seamless.
The front desk staff was very friendly and welcoming. My hygienist was amazing and welcoming. The doctor was kind and efficient. I was in and out in less than an hour.
Conveniently located right inside Stanley Marketplace — the perfect combo of great dental care and convenience.
Everyone from the front desk to the dental hygienists and doctors are just amazing and make me feel very comfortable and welcome.
Hygienist Alexis is absolutely amazing — she is such a warm, funny, and comforting human. My cleaning was thorough and I actually looked forward to coming in.
Hygienist Ariana was super efficient yet very considerate during my routine cleaning. She explained everything step by step as she worked.
Ariana handled my anxiety surrounding a deep cleaning so well. She did an excellent job and made the whole process easy.
The hygienists are gentle and fast. Dr. Weber is always warm and explains everything clearly. This is the only dentist I actually look forward to visiting.
The team was incredibly gentle, patient, and kept me informed every step of the way during my procedure.
I love this office. Patients are welcomed by name with a smile. The team is highly knowledgeable and confident, but approaches everything with compassion and care.
Been going to DSCP for over a year now. They are quick to respond in emergencies and have helped remove chronic pain I was dealing with. I will never go anywhere else.
